title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Gaborone City Council (retail Sales of Traditional Beer) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Gaborone City Council (retail Sales of Traditional Beer) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Gaborone City Council (Retail Sales of Traditional Beer) Bye-laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Traditional beer to be sold or bought only on licensed premises
provisions.content:
3. Traditional beer to be sold or bought only on licensed premises
(1) No person shall sell or buy any traditional beer by retail within the city except in a beer hall conducted by the council, or on premises licensed in terms of these Bye-laws:

definitions.definition: the area of jurisdiction of Gaborone City Council
licensed in terms of these Bye-laws
